signals.name: Military & Utility Jacket
signals.notes: Double-breasted Napoleon jackets, hussar-style, camo prints. Runway: Dior, McQueen, Burberry, Balmain. Fast fashion now adopting — cropped silhouettes, clean lines, fun colors. Celebrities spotted wearing.

signals.name: Lace Details Renaissance
signals.notes: Lace skirts, lace-trim shorts, lace blouses, lace cami tops. Not just boho anymore — combined with denim, tailored blazers. Pinterest: lace searches surging. EU market +20% forecast. Multiple retailer adoption confirmed.

signals.name: Bootcut Jeans Comeback
signals.notes: Modern refined version — slim thigh, slight flare at hem. NOT 2000s exaggerated. Wide-leg fatigue driving demand. Kendrick Lamar at Super Bowl, Bella Hadid street style. Styled with ballet flats, kitten heels (not boots).

signals.name: Maximalism & Color Blocking
signals.notes: Quiet luxury fully out. Colour-blocking comeback — khaki+fuchsia, navy+yellow, lilac+red. Gen Z maximalism: lace, satin, denim in one look. Bold silhouettes: sculpted shoulders, voluminous sleeves. Prada 'unlikely combinations' led.

signals.name: Sunshine Yellow Statement
signals.notes: One of the biggest spring color stories. Canary yellow, sunshine yellow. Tory Burch, Lanvin, Ferragamo all on runways. Paired with neutrals or used as clash color. Moving to fast fashion now.

signals.name: Linen (Continued Dominance)
signals.notes: Linen is the star fabric of SS26. Resort-ready linen separates, drawstring pants, safari-inspired jackets, kimono cover-ups. Not seasonal anymore — everyday dressing. Natural fiber focus driven by sustainability.

signals.name: Ballet Flats (V-Cut / Kitten Heel Evolution)
signals.notes: V-cut ballet flats as comfort-meets-elegance. Now styled with bootcut jeans instead of boots. Kitten heel version also rising. Spring must-have footwear.

signals.name: Statement Accessories (Brooches & Woven Bags)
signals.notes: Brooch aesthetic: Pinterest searches +110% YoY. Sculptural pendants, visible chains, XL pendants. Woven bags from natural materials. Accessories getting main-character moment.

signals.name: Cherry Red Continuation
signals.notes: Cherry red confirmed by Prada, Tory Burch. Major color trend from 2025 carrying into 2026. Now in everyday fast fashion, not just statement pieces. Tomato red, coral variations also visible.

signals.name: Trench Coat Reinvented
signals.notes: Funnel necks, dropped waists, suede and linen textures. Not classic beige — now in colored versions, deconstructed. April weather driving demand. Positioned as blazer alternative.

signals.name: Polka Dots & Playful Prints
signals.notes: Zara spring collection leaning into polka dots across skirts and tops. Alongside florals, print energy returning as maximalism rises. Not seen since 2019.

signals.name: Vintage Sportswear Revival
signals.notes: Vintage Lululemon searches +1689% on Depop. Upcycled jerseys +233%. Rugby shirts with kitten heels. Track jackets with denim. The Gen Z 'uniform dressing' direction.

signals.name: Cloud Dancer / Off-White Dominance
signals.notes: Pantone Color of Year 2026: Cloud Dancer (PANTONE 11-4201). Soft airy off-white between warm and cool. Continues from ekru/krem trend of previous scans. Full outfit, blazers, linen pieces.

signals.name: Slouchy Draped Silhouettes
signals.notes: Off-the-shoulder, dropped waists, slinky draped fabrics. Gen Z move away from cinched waists. '00s slinkiness returning. Satin fluid fabrics driving this.
